title: entity
text: entity A development object that defines a logical data aggregation and its associated default characteristics and behavior. It may be mapped to a table in a database, but it can also represent transient data, a collection of controls, or constant data. Related Links development object A definition for a logical application unit, such as a component, entity, field, message, menu, global variable, and so on. Entities An Entity defines a logical data aggregation. It usually represents a relational database table, but it is possible to define non-database entities for transient data, reusable user interface controls, or other application structures.
